testcases.input: nums = [0,1,4,6,7,10], diff = 3 Output: 2 Explanation: (1, 2, 4) is an arithmetic triplet because both 7 - 4 == 3 and 4 - 1 == 3. (2, 4, 5) is an arithmetic triplet because both 10 - 7 == 3 and 7 - 4 == 3.
